# Test showing callgraph doesn't connect scripttest to programs it executes
# This is self-referential - using mcpscripttest to test mcpscripttest's callgraph limitation

# Create a simple test that calls a program
exec mkdir -p testdir
exec sh -c 'printf "exec echo \"Hello from test\"\nstdout \"Hello\"\n" > testdir/simple.txt'

# Run mcpscripttest on our simple test
# Create dummy test for mcpscripttest to run
mkdir -p testdata
exec sh -c 'echo "echo hello" > testdata/dummy.txt'

# Run mcpscripttest on the dummy test
exec sh -c 'mcpscripttest -- echo "dummy server" > stdout 2>&1'
exec grep 'PASS' stdout
stdout 'dummy.txt'

# Skipping static analysis of source package as it requires source access
# exec callgraph -algo static github.com/tmc/mcp/exp/cmd/mcpscripttest

# This shows the gap: callgraph sees that mcpscripttest uses exec.Command
# but doesn't know which specific programs it executes
